summary: REQ-19 requires updating `frontend/index.html` JSON-LD structured data to add `itemReviewed` to each Review object. The diff shows changes to `frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx` (HTML microdata attributes) and `frontend-file-summaries.txt`. The file-summaries.txt description of `frontend/index.html` does not mention any addition of `itemReviewed` to the JSON-LD block. The fix was applied to Testimonials.tsx microdata but the requirement specifically targets the JSON-LD in `frontend/index.html`.

missing_requirements.requirement: In `frontend/index.html`, update the JSON-LD structured data block so that every `Review` object in the `review` array includes an `itemReviewed` property with `@type: 'LocalBusiness'` and `name: 'VERDIER COUVERTURE'`.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not show any modification to `frontend/index.html`. The `frontend-file-summaries.txt` summary of `frontend/index.html` describes it as containing JSON-LD structured data but makes no mention of `itemReviewed` being added to Review objects. The fix was applied only to React component microdata in `Testimonials.tsx`, not to the JSON-LD in `index.html`.
